content_body: The local Kiwanis Rodeo has traditionally been one of the top small-town rodeos throughout the Southeast. Drawing about 2500 attendees per night, the annual Kiwanis Rodeo is always held on the third full weekend of August and is open on both Friday and Saturday nights, rain or shine at the Kiwanis Fairgrounds! Consisting of professional rodeo cowboys and cowgirls, a variety of events are competed in, including bull riding!
title: Blue Ridge Kiwanis Rodeo
